page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 8 vCPUs and 31.0 GB of system memory, yielding 3.88 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA T4 GPU based on the Turing architecture, providing 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. It has no local storage and operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between CPU-bound tasks and GPU-accelerated workloads. The CPU performance is generally modest, with stress-ng single-core and multi-core results falling into the bottom 25% tier. Similarly, Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores are weak. However, the integrated NVIDIA T4 GPU delivers strong performance for machine learning tasks. LLM inference benchmarks show top-tier prompt processing speeds of 8407.18 tokens/sec for a small 135M model and 1134.43 tokens/sec for a medium 7B model, alongside a strong text generation speed of 33.96 tokens/sec on the 7B model.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server offers a budget-friendly entry point for GPU-accelerated computing, balancing a dedicated but older Intel Xeon CPU with a capable Turing-generation GPU. The primary tradeoff is the weak general-purpose CPU and memory performance, as evidenced by low Passmark memory scores and weak Redis SET throughput. Consequently, this instance is not suited for CPU-heavy databases or high-throughput web serving. It is best suited for lightweight GPU workloads, such as small-to-medium LLM inference, machine learning model deployment, and basic parallel processing tasks where GPU acceleration offsets the modest CPU capabilities.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz, 31.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Operating under a KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps and contains no local storage. Benchmark results indicate weak general-purpose CPU and memory performance, with stress-ng and Geekbench scores falling into the bottom 25% tier. Conversely, the server excels in GPU-driven tasks, demonstrating top-tier prompt processing speeds of 1134.43 tokens/sec on a medium 7B LLM and strong text generation performance. This hardware profile offers a cost-effective option for GPU-accelerated workloads, making it suitable for small-to-medium machine learning inference and parallel processing, while remaining less optimal for CPU-intensive database or web-serving applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is an x86_64 server with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 31 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU, delivering top-tier prompt processing for small and medium LLM inference workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 31 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for cost-effective machine learning inference.
tagline: An entry-level GPU instance pairing dedicated Intel Xeon processors with an NVIDIA T4 accelerator for efficient machine learning inference.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz
NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for hardware acceleration
31.0 GB of system memory and 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier prompt processing performance for 7B LLM inference
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Suited for lightweight machine learning deployment and parallel processing
